Do NOT use for DEX swaps — use okx-dex-swap. Do NOT use for token search or market data — use okx-dex-token or okx-dex-market. Do NOT use for smart money / whale / KOL signals — use okx-dex-signal. Do NOT use for meme token scanning — use okx-dex-trenches. Do NOT use for transaction broadcasting (non-wallet) — use okx-onchain-gateway.
